pi_items.source: Found explicitly assigned in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh.
Found explicitly assigned as NEW_VOLUME in export_result.sh.
Found hardcoded in the veracrypt mount command in setup_task.sh.
Found explicitly expected in the veracrypt mount command in export_result.sh.
Found explicitly checked via the --pim flag in export_result.sh.
Found explicitly assigned as TOKEN_DIR in setup_task.sh.
Found statically copied into the volume in setup_task.sh and checked as an array in export_result.sh.

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task operates on synthetically generated VeraCrypt volumes and visual keyfile images dynamically created by setup scripts. Verified that the explicit source volume path, destination volume path, source password, destination password, destination PIM, token directory, and list of required files exactly match the metadata claims and the explicit configuration checks in the setup and export bash scripts.
